productDisplayName: Free Authority Men Stripes Green Sweatshirts
description: Composition Green and grey striped jersey made of 48% cotton and 52% polyester, has a round neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a flat knit hem and brand logo embroidered on the left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print This bioworld jersey is precision-tailored to smartly create your everyday wear and make it a fashion must-have. The winter's texture trend has reached a new high with this cozy yet stylish piece. Pair it with corduroys or jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in jerseys Height: 6', Shoulders: 18""
